2015-T3-P4-S1.trunk: S+V+O：John Ioannidis … says that the policy is 「a most welcome step forward」 and 「long overdue」（约安尼迪斯说这一政策「极受欢迎、早该如此」）
structure: 主句：John Ioannidis … says that the policy is 「a most welcome step forward」 and 「long overdue」
├ 同位语〔说明 John Ioannidis〕：a physician
│   └ 定语从句〔who，修饰 a physician〕：who studies research methodology
└ 宾语从句(that)：the policy is 「a most welcome step forward」 and 「long overdue」（并列表语）
（后续引语另为两句）：…damages the quality of what they publish … statistical review is more essential than expert review
├ 名词性从句(what，作 of 的宾语)：what they publish
└ 比较级：more essential than expert review
2015-T3-P4-S1.logic: 主句 says that…（同位语 a physician who…）；宾语从句并列表语；后续引语含 what 从句、比较结构、I think that…。
notes: a physician who studies research methodology：a physician 是同位语，who 定语从句再修饰之。
the quality of what they publish：what 名词性从句作 of 的宾语。
more essential than：比较级；a most welcome（a + most，「非常受欢迎的一步」）。

2015-T3-P3-S2.trunk: S+V：He agreed to join（他同意加入）
structure: 主句：He agreed to join
原因状语从句(because)：because he 「found the foresight … to be novel, unique and likely to have a lasting impact …」
└ find + 宾 + to be + 宾补：found the foresight … to be novel, unique and likely to have a lasting impact
（引语后句）：This impact will not only be through the publications in Science itself, but … through a larger group of publishing places …
├ not only … but … 并列：through the publications… / through a larger group of publishing places
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 publishing places〕：that may want to model their approach after Science
2015-T3-P3-S2.logic: 主句 He agreed to join；because 原因从句，find sth to be …（认为…是…）；引语后句 not only…but… 并列，that 定语从句修饰 publishing places。
notes: find sth to be …：found the foresight … to be novel…（认为…具有…）。
not only … but (also) …：并列两个 through 短语。
model their approach after Science：仿照《科学》塑造其做法；that 定语从句修饰 publishing places。

2015-T3-P2-S1.trunk: 过去分词状语+主句：Asked whether …, McNutt said: 「…」（被问及是否…时，麦克纳特说：「…」）
structure: 过去分词作状语(被动)：Asked whether any particular papers had impelled the change
└ 宾语从句(whether)：whether any particular papers had impelled the change
主句：McNutt said: 「…」
引语：The creation of the 'statistics board' was motivated by … and is part of Science's overall drive to increase reproducibility in the research we publish
├ 并列谓语：was motivated by … / is part of …
├ 不定式作定语〔修饰 drive〕：to increase reproducibility in the research we publish
└ 定语从句〔省略关系词，修饰 research〕：we publish
2015-T3-P2-S1.logic: Asked whether…（过去分词作状语 = When asked whether…）；主句 McNutt said；引语并列谓语 was motivated by… and is part of…；to increase… 修饰 drive；(that) we publish 定语从句修饰 research。
notes: Asked whether…：过去分词短语作状语（被问及是否…时）。
引语并列谓语：was motivated by… and is part of…。
the research (that) we publish：research 后省略关系词的定语从句；reproducibility 可重复性。
